stemHtml: On a direct flight from London to Southern France, the flight crew notice a strong crosswind from the right whilst cruising at FL190. Which of the following statements is correct, with regards to altitude?

options.a: The pressure altitude will be increasing.
options.b: The aircraft's true altitude will be increasing.
options.c: The radio altimeter will show an altitude increase.
options.d: The altitude indicated on the aneroid altimeter will be decreasing.
